title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: SCENIC MIDDLE SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 1955 Scenic Avenue Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: All children 0-18 Hours: During School Year: Monday-Friday 7:30am-3:30pm (541) 494-6417 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 494-6417 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Central Point School District and Jackson county SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm, when school is in session Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SCENIC MIDDLE SCHOOL SBHC
